fields.name: arrears_flags
fields.description: Collection of flagged accounts in arrears status, reported from Credit to Risk and Compliance for monitoring and action

children.name: account_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the bank account in arrears

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the account

children.name: customer_name
children.description: Full name of the customer

children.name: product_type
children.description: Classification of the credit product (e.g., Mortgage, Personal Loan, Credit Card)

children.name: arrears_status
children.description: Categorical representation of arrears duration in days

children.name: arrears_days
children.description: Number of days the account is in arrears

children.name: outstanding_balance
children.description: Total amount owed on the account

children.name: minimum_payment_due
children.description: Minimum payment amount required to bring account current

children.name: payment_due_date
children.description: The date on which the payment was originally due

children.name: last_payment_date
children.description: The most recent date a payment was received on the account

children.name: flag_severity
children.description: Risk severity level assigned to the arrears flag for prioritization by Risk and Compliance

children.name: risk_category
children.description: Classification of the risk type associated with the arrears account

children.name: compliance_action_required
children.description: Indicator of whether compliance action is mandated for this flagged account

children.name: action_type
children.description: Type of action to be taken by Risk and Compliance department

children.name: flag_date
children.description: Date and time when the arrears flag was created or last updated

children.name: notes
children.description: Free-text commentary on the arrears situation, payment history, or recommended actions

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Contextual information about the arrears flags report

children.name: report_date
children.description: The date on which the arrears flags report was generated

children.name: total_flagged_accounts
children.description: Count of accounts included in this arrears flags report

children.name: source_department
children.description: The originating department that produced the report

children.name: destination_department
children.description: The receiving department responsible for risk and compliance actions

children.name: report_version
children.description: Version identifier for the report schema and content
